summary: Fast food may contribute to asthma through its association with obesity, chronic inflammation, and socioeconomic factors that increase exposure to environmental triggers. These indirect pathways suggest it acts as an important modifiable lifestyle risk factor rather than a direct cause of asthmatic disease.
